learning_roadmap.title: Foundational Life Science & Research: {first_gap}
learning_roadmap.description: Study core biological or clinical protocols and master the basics of {first_gap}.

learning_roadmap.title: Clinical/Health Data Application: {second_gap}
learning_roadmap.description: Analyze patient metrics, public health data, or trial research using {second_gap}.

learning_roadmap.title: Ethics & Patient Communication Brief
learning_roadmap.description: Draft a plain-language summary of a health case study with source verification and safety guidelines.

ai_exposure_breakdown.ai_role: AI summarizes medical journals, clinical trials, and compound data.
ai_exposure_breakdown.human_role: Human verifies source reliability, clinical relevance, and validity.

ai_exposure_breakdown.ai_role: AI suggests general wellness tips and preliminary triage questions.
ai_exposure_breakdown.human_role: Human owns empathetic communication, physical diagnosis, and ethical responsibility.

ai_exposure_breakdown.ai_role: AI scans imaging files to flag anomalies for doctor review.
ai_exposure_breakdown.human_role: Human specialist validates findings, manages treatment plans, and oversees care.

evolution_timeline.title: Clinical / Health Research Assistant
evolution_timeline.description: Learn medical terminology, summarize peer-reviewed studies, and support health data collection.

evolution_timeline.title: Health Tech / Clinical Coordinator
evolution_timeline.description: Coordinate trial data, manage health communication projects, and evaluate biotech tools.

evolution_timeline.title: Specialized Healthcare Practitioner / Lead
evolution_timeline.description: Lead specialized patient care or biotech product development combining domain judgment and AI technology.

future_self.headline: Future Healthcare / Bio-Impact Professional
future_self.narrative: {name} can make a tangible human impact by combining healthcare empathy with technology. AI tools will accelerate research and data analysis, but human judgment and care remain paramount.
future_resume_highlights: Created a plain-language health communication guide based on {title}.
Analyzed public health data sets to extract actionable community insights.
Demonstrated rigorous ethical compliance and source verification.

risk_heatmap.description: High human interaction and diagnostic responsibility limit full automation.
Core medical and biological fundamentals remain steady across decades.
Rigorous qualification standards create strong barriers to entry.
Human lives and privacy require the highest standards of trust and ethical accountability.
